description: Simulate a more complex backend store server that would be developed separately.
Allow a text node to represent free text, numbers, booleans, dates, and similar scalar values.
Reject writes when the submitted version is not based on the latest stored version.
Run as a CLI that loads a CUE configuration file.
Allow behaviour and lightweight validation to be customised for different product needs.
Be sufficient to test client code against a realistic mock server.
Provide a lightweight implementation of the evolving Yggdrasil protocol.
Keep WebSocket support optional because some clients may not support it.
Limit WebSocket messages to well-known identifiers to reduce escaping and safety concerns.
Use heartbeat ping/pong messages to keep WebSocket connections alive.
